productName: Canna Organix Infused Pre-roll Headshots - Snow Break - 1g
description: A hybrid infused joint built on Snow Break and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — a balanced, sweet-earthy profile, with a smooth, well-rounded vibe. A little goes a long way.
